seo.title: Kling 1.6 AI Video Generator | Try Kling 1.6 Online | LazyKiwi
seo.description: Kling 1.6 by Kuaishou generates high-quality AI videos from text and images. Create realistic motion, cinematic scenes, and professional video content online.

hero.headline: Generate **Professional Videos** from Text and Images
hero.tagline: Kuaishou's advanced AI video generation model with extended duration and motion control
hero.description: Kling 1.6 transforms text prompts and images into high-quality videos up to 10 seconds long. Built by Kuaishou Technology, it delivers smooth motion, accurate physics simulation, and detailed scene generation. The model supports text-to-video and image-to-video workflows, offering precise control over camera movements, character actions, and environmental dynamics for content creators and developers.
hero.description_backup: Kling 1.6 creates realistic videos from text descriptions and static images. Developed by Kuaishou, this model generates up to 10 seconds of footage with natural motion, coherent scene transitions, and detailed object interactions. It handles complex prompts involving multiple subjects, dynamic camera movements, and specific visual styles, making it suitable for creative projects, marketing content, and rapid video prototyping.
hero.name: Kling 1.6

steps.title: Three steps from idea to video
steps.description: Transform text prompts into professional video content with Kling 1.6's advanced generation capabilities in minutes.

items.title: Select model and input prompt
items.description: Choose Kling 1.6 from the video models menu and enter your detailed text description of the scene you want to create.
items.image_prompt: Clean web interface showing Kling 1.6 selected in a dropdown menu, with a large text input box below containing a sample prompt like 'A cat walking through a sunlit garden'. Modern UI with soft shadows, purple accent color, white background.

items.title: Configure video parameters
items.description: Adjust duration, aspect ratio, motion intensity, and camera movement settings to control how your video will look and behave.
items.image_prompt: Settings panel interface showing slider controls for video duration (5-10 seconds), aspect ratio buttons (16:9, 9:16, 1:1), motion intensity slider, and camera movement options. Clean layout with labeled controls and preview thumbnail.

items.title: Generate and download video
items.description: Click generate to create your video, preview the result in the built-in player, then download in your preferred format and resolution.
items.image_prompt: Video player interface displaying a generated video with playback controls, alongside a download button with format options (MP4, WebM) and resolution selector (1080p, 4K). Progress indicator showing completion. Modern, intuitive layout.

capabilities.title: What sets Kling 1.6 apart
capabilities.description: Kling 1.6 represents Kuaishou's latest advancement in AI video generation, combining photorealistic rendering with accurate physics simulation. The model delivers cinematic quality at production-ready speeds, handling complex motion and lighting scenarios that previously challenged generative video systems.

items.title: Cinema-quality visuals in every frame
items.description: Advanced neural rendering produces photorealistic textures, accurate lighting, and natural color grading. The model captures fine details like fabric movement, skin texture, and reflective surfaces with unprecedented clarity for AI-generated video.
items.image_prompt: Close-up cinematic shot of a person's face with natural skin texture, detailed fabric clothing, dramatic side lighting creating soft shadows, photorealistic rendering with visible pores and fine details, film grain, shallow depth of field

items.title: Motion that follows real-world physics
items.description: Built-in physics engine ensures objects move, collide, and interact according to natural laws. From fluid dynamics to rigid body mechanics, Kling 1.6 generates motion that looks authentic without manual keyframing or correction.
items.image_prompt: Water splashing from a glass tipping over on a wooden table, liquid droplets in mid-air with accurate physics, realistic fluid dynamics, natural gravity and momentum, clear reflections and refractions in water

items.title: Smooth motion without flickering or artifacts
items.description: Advanced temporal modeling maintains object identity and coherence across frames. Characters, backgrounds, and details remain stable throughout clips, eliminating the jarring transitions and morphing artifacts common in earlier video generation models.
items.image_prompt: Continuous tracking shot following a person walking through a crowded street, consistent facial features and clothing throughout, smooth camera motion, stable background elements, no flickering or distortion

items.title: Professional quality at scale
items.description: Optimized inference pipeline generates high-resolution video significantly faster than competing models. The architecture balances computational efficiency with output quality, making professional video production workflows practical for creative teams and individual creators alike.
items.image_prompt: Split-screen comparison showing timeline interface with multiple video clips being generated simultaneously, progress bars moving quickly, high-resolution preview thumbnails, professional video editing workspace aesthetic

faq.question: What is Kling 1.6?
faq.answer: Kling 1.6 is Kuaishou's advanced AI video generation model that creates high-quality videos from text prompts or images. It features improved motion consistency, enhanced realism, and support for longer video durations compared to previous versions.

faq.question: Is Kling 1.6 free to use?
faq.answer: Kling 1.6 offers a limited free tier with daily credits for testing. Paid plans provide additional generation credits, faster processing, and commercial usage rights. Pricing varies by region and usage volume.

faq.question: How does Kling 1.6 compare to Runway and Pika?
faq.answer: Kling 1.6 excels in physics simulation and motion coherence, particularly for complex scenes. It offers competitive video length and resolution. Runway leads in editing features, while Pika focuses on stylized creative outputs.

faq.question: What video length and resolution does Kling 1.6 support?
faq.answer: Kling 1.6 generates videos up to 2 minutes long at 1080p resolution. It supports various aspect ratios including 16:9, 9:16, and 1:1, making it suitable for social media and professional content creation.

faq.question: How do I start using Kling 1.6?
faq.answer: Access Kling 1.6 through Kuaishou's platform by creating an account. Enter text prompts or upload reference images, adjust generation parameters, and click generate. Results typically appear within minutes depending on video length and complexity.

bottomCta.title: Create Professional AI Videos with Kling 1.6
bottomCta.description: Generate high-quality videos from text or images in seconds. Experience advanced motion control, realistic physics, and cinematic output up to 1080p resolution.
